Magic Mike’s Last Dance (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $26,033,633Details
International Box Office $31,100,000
Worldwide Box Office $57,133,633
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,037,072
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,459,136
Total $2,496,208
Further financial details...

Synopsis

“Magic” Mike Lane takes to the stage again after a lengthy hiatus, following a business deal that went bust, leaving him broke and taking bartender gigs in Florida. For what he hopes will be one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can’t refuse and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, once Mike discovers what she truly has in mind, will he—and the roster of hot new dancers he’ll have to whip into shape—be able to pull it off?

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,305,317 (31.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.13 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,496 opening theaters/3,034 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $28,460,901

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 10th, 2023 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: February 8th, 2023 (Wide) (Belgium)
February 9th, 2023 (Wide), released as Magic Mike’s Last Dance (Супер Майк: Останній танець) (Russia (CIS))
February 9th, 2023 (Wide) (Austria)
February 9th, 2023 (Wide), released as Magic Mike - A Última Dança (Portugal)
February 9th, 2023 (Wide) (Switzerland)
Video Release: February 28th, 2023 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for sexual material and language.
(Rating bulletin 2765 (cert #54085), 1/11/2023)
Running Time: 110 minutes
Franchise: Magic Mike
Filming location (city or town): London, England
Filming location (country): England, United Kingdom
Plot point: Dancing
Social setting: Strippers / Stripping
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Free Association, Warner Bros.
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

“Magic” Mike Lane takes to the stage again after a lengthy hiatus, following a business deal that went bust, leaving him broke and taking bartender gigs in Florida. For what he hopes will be one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can’t refuse and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, once Mike discovers what she truly has in mind, will he—and the roster of hot new dancers he’ll have to whip into shape—be able to pull it off?
